title: Sourcemeta One Schema RDF RPC Input
description: Validate a JSON instance against a schema in the catalog and promote it to JSON-LD using the x-jsonld-* annotations of the schema

schema.description: Absolute URI of a JSON Schema in this catalog

stringifiedInstance.description: The JSON value to promote to JSON-LD, encoded as a string of valid JSON. The server parses this string before evaluation, so non-string MCP clients can still send objects, numbers, booleans, null, or arrays without losing the JSON type
stringifiedInstance.$comment: Accepting the instance as a JSON-encoded string is a workaround for MCP clients that stringify non-string tool arguments before sending them. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24599 and https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/issues/1112

flatten.description: Whether to flatten the resulting JSON-LD document

stringifiedContext.description: A JSON-LD context to compact the resulting document against, encoded as a string of valid JSON. The server parses this string before compacting, so non-string MCP clients can still send the context object without losing the JSON type
stringifiedContext.$comment: Accepting the context as a JSON-encoded string is a workaround for MCP clients that stringify non-string tool arguments before sending them. See https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code/issues/24599 and https://github.com/modelcontextprotocol/python-sdk/issues/1112
